purpose: Pilot: Resolve tau=0.0 paradox (decisive experiment for CD-SSD mechanistic claim)

pilot_tasks.name: tau=0.0 vs naive T=16 Pilot
pilot_tasks.description: Compare CD-SSD(tau=0.9) vs CD-SSD(tau=0.0) vs naive-T16 vs M1+CD-SSD(tau=0.9) vs M1+naive-T16 on 50 GSM8K samples, seed=42.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: All 5 conditions measured; QAS values recorded

decision_rule.tau0_beats_naiveT16: Accept gate has value; mechanistic claim justified
decision_rule.tau0_approx_naiveT16: Accept gate adds no value; reframe CD-SSD as step-reduction

pilot_decision_checklist: tau=0.0 QAS vs naive-T16 QAS: is there a gap?
M1+CD-SSD(tau=0.9) Ortho vs M1+naive-T16 Ortho: which is higher?
Does either comparison settle the tau=0.0 paradox?
